{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Li Remnants
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] uses [[Remnants]] like [[jade]] hawks, silver butterflies, and twin-headed crimson eagles to approach.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
